title: U.S. Orders Diplomats to Leave Consulate in Southern Turkey
summary_full: The order came after the interception of two missiles heading toward Turkey, which has a base that hosts U.S. and NATO forces.
summary_public: The order came after the interception of two missiles heading toward Turkey, which has a base that hosts U.S. and NATO forces.
